title: Add unit tests for SpecParsingService
body:
## Description

Expand test coverage for `SpecParsingService` beyond the existing basic tests. Cover edge cases in spec parsing.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tests for specs with no requirements
- [ ] Tests for specs with multiple scenarios per requirement
- [ ] Tests for RFC 2119 keyword extraction (MUST, SHOULD, MAY, SHALL)
- [ ] Tests for malformed markdown (missing headings, empty sections)
- [ ] Tests for multi-domain parsing via `parseAllSpecs()`
- [ ] All tests pass in CI

## Technical Notes

Use JUnit 5. Test class: `SpecParsingServiceTest.java`. Mock VirtualFile for file-based tests.

title: Add unit tests for BuiltInValidator
body:
## Description

Create comprehensive tests for `BuiltInValidator` covering spec, change, and config validation rules.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tests for spec validation: title required, requirements present, RFC 2119 keywords
- [ ] Tests for change validation: metadata exists, required artifacts, delta spec references
- [ ] Tests for config validation: schema version, required fields, profile validation
- [ ] Tests for strict mode behavior
- [ ] Edge cases: empty files, missing fields, unknown schema versions

## Technical Notes

New test class: `BuiltInValidatorTest.java`. Construct model objects directly for unit testing.

title: Add unit tests for CliOutputParser
body:
## Description

Test JSON and text parsing from CLI output including artifact status, validation results, and error handling.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tests for valid JSON artifact status parsing
- [ ] Tests for valid JSON validation result parsing
- [ ] Tests for malformed JSON handling
- [ ] Tests for plain text fallback parsing
- [ ] Tests for empty/null input

## Technical Notes

New test class: `CliOutputParserTest.java`. Use sample JSON fixtures.

title: Add unit tests for VersionSupport
body:
## Description

Test version enum behavior: required fields, artifacts, schema validation per version.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tests for each version (v1.0, v1.1, v1.2) required config fields
- [ ] Tests for required artifacts per version
- [ ] Tests for valid schema detection
- [ ] Tests for version ordering and comparison

## Technical Notes

New test class: `VersionSupportTest.java`.

title: Handle malformed YAML gracefully in ConfigService
body:
## Description

When `config.yaml` contains invalid YAML, `ConfigService` should show a clear error notification instead of a stack trace.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Invalid YAML shows a user-friendly notification balloon
- [ ] Error message includes the file path and parse error location
- [ ] `isConfigLoaded()` returns false after failed parse
- [ ] Subsequent calls to `getConfig()` retry parsing
- [ ] No uncaught exceptions in the IDE log

## Technical Notes

Catch `YAMLException` in `ConfigService.getConfig()`. Use `OpenSpecNotifier.error()` for the notification.

title: Add CLI command timeout configuration
body:
## Description

CLI commands currently have a hardcoded timeout. Allow users to configure the timeout in settings.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] New setting: CLI timeout (seconds) with default of 30
- [ ] Setting appears in Settings â†’ Tools â†’ OpenSpec
- [ ] `CliRunner` reads timeout from settings
- [ ] Timeout exceeded shows clear error message

## Technical Notes

Add `cliTimeout` field to `OpenSpecSettings`. Pass to `CliRunner` execution.

title: Add progress indicator for long-running operations
body:
## Description

CLI commands and API calls should show an IntelliJ progress bar instead of appearing to hang.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Generate Artifact shows progress indicator
- [ ] Generate All shows progress with artifact count
- [ ] CLI commands show indeterminate progress
- [ ] Progress is cancellable where possible

## Technical Notes

Use `Task.Backgroundable` with `ProgressIndicator`. Already partially implemented â€” ensure consistency across all long-running actions.

title: Improve error messages for API failures
body:
## Description

DirectApiService error messages should be more actionable â€” include HTTP status, provider-specific error details, and suggested fixes.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] 401 errors suggest re-checking the API key
- [ ] 429 errors mention rate limiting and suggest waiting
- [ ] 500+ errors suggest checking provider status
- [ ] Error details shown in both notification and Console tab

## Technical Notes

Enhance `AiApiException` to carry structured error info. Update `DirectApiService` error handling.

title: Add keyboard shortcuts for common actions
body:
## Description

Assign keyboard shortcuts to frequently used actions for power users.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Propose: assigned default shortcut
- [ ] Validate: assigned default shortcut
- [ ] Refresh: assigned default shortcut
- [ ] Shortcuts documented in plugin.xml with `<keyboard-shortcut>` elements
- [ ] Shortcuts visible in menu items
- [ ] No conflicts with default IntelliJ shortcuts

## Technical Notes

Add `<keyboard-shortcut>` to action registrations in `plugin.xml`. Use platform-appropriate modifiers (Meta on macOS, Ctrl on others).

title: Fix dark theme colors in tree renderer
body:
## Description

`SpecTreeCellRenderer` hardcodes colors that may not be readable in dark themes (Darcula/New Dark).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All tree node text is readable in both light and dark themes
- [ ] Use `JBColor` for theme-aware colors
- [ ] Status colors (green/blue/gray) adapt to theme
- [ ] Tested in Darcula and New UI dark theme

## Technical Notes

Replace `new Color(...)` with `JBColor(light, dark)` pairs in `SpecTreeCellRenderer`.

title: Add spec template selection for Propose
body:
## Description

When proposing a change, allow users to select from predefined templates (e.g., feature, bugfix, refactor) that pre-populate the proposal.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] ProposeChangeDialog includes template dropdown
- [ ] At least 3 templates: Feature, Bug Fix, Refactor
- [ ] Templates pre-fill proposal.md with appropriate sections
- [ ] Custom option for blank proposal

## Technical Notes

Extend `ProposeChangeDialog` with template selection. Add templates to `TemplateProvider`.

title: Add inline quick-fixes for validation issues
body:
## Description

Inspections should provide quick-fix actions (Alt+Enter) to resolve common validation issues.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Missing title â†’ quick-fix to insert `# Title` template
- [ ] Missing RFC 2119 keyword â†’ quick-fix to insert MUST/SHOULD
- [ ] Missing `.openspec.yaml` â†’ quick-fix to create metadata file
- [ ] Quick-fixes appear in the intention popup (Alt+Enter)

## Technical Notes

Implement `LocalQuickFix` in each inspection class. Register via `registerFix()` in `ProblemDescriptor`.

title: Improve validation result formatting
body:
## Description

Validation results should be displayed in a structured panel or tool window tab instead of just a notification balloon.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Validation results shown in a dedicated panel or Console tab section
- [ ] Issues grouped by file
- [ ] Clickable file paths that navigate to the issue location
- [ ] Severity icons (error/warning/info)
- [ ] Summary line: "X errors, Y warnings"

## Technical Notes

Consider using IntelliJ's `ProblemsView` API or formatting output in the Console tab with hyperlinks.

title: Add support for v2.0 schema
body:
## Description

Extend `VersionSupport` to handle a v2.0 schema with new artifact types and config fields.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] New `v2_0` enum value in `VersionSupport`
- [ ] v2.0 required config fields defined
- [ ] v2.0 artifact set defined
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained for v1.x
- [ ] Config validation updated for v2.0 rules

## Technical Notes

Add enum value. Define required fields and artifacts based on OpenSpec CLI v2.0 spec.

title: Add integration tests for action lifecycle
body:
## Description

Create integration tests that verify the full action lifecycle: init â†’ propose â†’ generate â†’ apply â†’ archive.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Test init creates correct directory structure
- [ ] Test propose creates change with metadata
- [ ] Test apply updates status
- [ ] Test archive moves to archive directory
- [ ] Tests use IntelliJ test framework (`BasePlatformTestCase`)

## Technical Notes

Use `HeavyPlatformTestCase` or `BasePlatformTestCase` for tests that need a full project environment.

title: Add notification grouping and history
body:
## Description

Multiple rapid notifications (e.g., during Generate All) should be grouped. Add a way to review past notifications.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Rapid notifications are collapsed into a single group notification
- [ ] Group notification shows count and expand button
- [ ] Notification history viewable in Console tab or Event Log

## Technical Notes

Use IntelliJ `NotificationGroup` features for collapsing. Log to Console tab in parallel.

title: Support multi-project workspaces
body:
## Description

Allow the plugin to work with IntelliJ projects that contain multiple OpenSpec roots (e.g., monorepos).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Plugin detects multiple `openspec/` directories in project modules
- [ ] Tool window shows all OpenSpec roots
- [ ] Actions work relative to the selected root
- [ ] Settings can be per-root or global

## Technical Notes

Refactor `OpenSpecProjectService.isOpenSpecProject()` to return a list. Update tree model to support multiple roots.

title: Publish to JetBrains Marketplace
body:
## Description

Prepare and publish the plugin to the JetBrains Marketplace for easy installation.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Plugin descriptor has complete metadata (description, vendor, change notes)
- [ ] Plugin icon meets marketplace requirements
- [ ] Plugin passes `verifyPlugin` task
- [ ] Published and visible on marketplace
- [ ] Installation works via Settings â†’ Plugins â†’ Marketplace

## Technical Notes

Update `plugin.xml` with full metadata. Use `publishPlugin` Gradle task. May need JetBrains Hub account.

title: Add Ollama integration for local AI models
body:
## Description

Support Ollama as a local AI provider for artifact generation without cloud API keys.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] New `AiProvider.OLLAMA` enum value
- [ ] Ollama endpoint configuration in settings (default: `http://localhost:11434`)
- [ ] Model selection from locally available models
- [ ] Direct API delivery mode works with Ollama
- [ ] Error handling for Ollama not running

## Technical Notes

Ollama uses OpenAI-compatible API at `/v1/chat/completions`. Extend `DirectApiService` to support the Ollama endpoint.

title: Add streaming API response support
body:
## Description

Support streaming responses from AI providers to show real-time generation progress.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Streaming support for Claude API (SSE)
- [ ] Streaming support for OpenAI API (SSE)
- [ ] Real-time output display in Console tab during generation
- [ ] Final result written to artifact file after stream completes
- [ ] Cancellation support (stop generation mid-stream)

## Technical Notes

Use `HttpURLConnection` with chunked reading or a streaming HTTP client. Parse SSE `data:` lines.

title: Add spec search and filtering
body:
## Description

Add a search/filter bar to the tool window for finding specs, requirements, and changes by keyword.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Search bar at top of Browse tab
- [ ] Filters tree nodes by label text
- [ ] Highlights matching text in nodes
- [ ] Clears filter to restore full tree
- [ ] Keyboard shortcut to focus search (Ctrl/Cmd+F in tool window)

## Technical Notes

Add `TreeSpeedSearch` or custom filter field to `OpenSpecToolWindowPanel`. Filter `SpecTreeModel` nodes during rebuild.

title: Register OpenSpec file types with IntelliJ
body:
## Description

Register `.openspec.yaml`, spec.md, and delta spec files as recognized file types with custom icons.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `.openspec.yaml` recognized with OpenSpec icon
- [ ] Spec files in `openspec/specs/` shown with spec icon
- [ ] Delta spec files shown with delta spec icon
- [ ] File type associations registered in plugin.xml

## Technical Notes

Implement `FileTypeFactory` or use `<fileType>` extension in plugin.xml. Custom icons from `/icons/`.

title: Add change diff viewer
body:
## Description

Show a diff view comparing spec before and after applying delta specs from a change.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Right-click change â†’ "View Spec Diff"
- [ ] Opens IntelliJ diff viewer with original spec vs. modified spec
- [ ] Delta specs merged into base spec for preview
- [ ] Read-only diff (informational only)

## Technical Notes

Use `DiffManager.getInstance().showDiff()` with `SimpleDiffRequest`. Build modified content by applying delta specs programmatically.

title: Add OpenSpec file templates
body:
## Description

Register file templates so users can create spec.md and delta spec files from File â†’ New.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] File â†’ New â†’ OpenSpec Spec template
- [ ] File â†’ New â†’ OpenSpec Delta Spec template
- [ ] Templates include proper structure with placeholders
- [ ] Templates available only inside `openspec/` directories

## Technical Notes

Use `<internalFileTemplate>` in plugin.xml. Template files go in `resources/fileTemplates/`.

title: Document all public APIs with Javadoc
body:
## Description

Add Javadoc to all public classes and methods in service and model packages.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All public service methods have Javadoc
- [ ] All model classes have class-level Javadoc
- [ ] All enums have value-level documentation
- [ ] `./gradlew javadoc` produces clean output

## Technical Notes

Focus on services/, model/, and validation/ packages. Actions are self-documenting via naming.

title: Add CI pipeline with GitHub Actions
body:
## Description

Set up automated build and test pipeline.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Build runs on every push and PR
- [ ] Tests run with JUnit 5
- [ ] Plugin verification (`verifyPlugin`) runs
- [ ] Build artifacts uploaded (plugin ZIP)
- [ ] Badge in README showing build status

## Technical Notes

Use `actions/setup-java@v4` with JDK 17. Run `./gradlew build verifyPlugin`.

title: Add tree node tooltips with detailed info
body:
## Description

Hover tooltips on tree nodes should show additional context (file path, status details, dependency list).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Spec nodes show file path and requirement count
- [ ] Change nodes show status, creation date, artifact count
- [ ] Artifact nodes show dependencies and blocking info
- [ ] Tooltips formatted with HTML for readability

## Technical Notes

Override `getToolTipText()` in `SpecTreeCellRenderer` or set tooltips in `SpecTreeModel`.

title: Handle concurrent file operations safely
body:
## Description

Multiple operations (refresh, validate, generate) can run concurrently and cause race conditions on file access.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] File reads use VFS read actions
- [ ] File writes use `WriteAction.run()`
- [ ] Tree model rebuild is atomic (swap on EDT)
- [ ] Cache invalidation is thread-safe

## Technical Notes

Review all file operations in services for proper `ReadAction`/`WriteAction` usage. Use `ConcurrentHashMap` for caches.

title: Add config.yaml code completion
body:
## Description

Provide code completion for known fields in `config.yaml` (schema, version, profile, context, rules).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Completion for top-level keys
- [ ] Completion for schema version values
- [ ] Completion for profile names
- [ ] Works in both YAML and config.yaml contexts

## Technical Notes

Implement `CompletionContributor` for YAML files. Check file is `config.yaml` in openspec/ directory.
